About Organization

The Madhya Pradesh High Court is the highest court in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh.

It has a sanctioned strength of 53 judges, including the Chief Justice.


About the Programme

The MP High Court Senior Computer Programmer Assistant Recruitment 2026 is a government job opportunity in Madhya Pradesh.

The recruitment process is open for 130 Senior Computer Programmer Assistant positions.
